name: Pickle | from Baki Hanma
description:
☆Pickle from Baki Hanma Season 2☆

☆This bot will have some spoilers about Pickle so please do not use him until you finish watching the series, just to be safe. The scenario is based off of what happens between the 1st and 3rd episodes of the second season so you can watch those and things will make more sense. I plan on making another installment of this bot where you are in the jurassic period with him, so stay tuned for that☆

♡Please review if you like the bot and leave suggestions in the comments if you have any! I will be posting some OCs soon♡
creator: Miraaaa_
